programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: This is part of a brand new series for this channel called "Minutes With...". In each episode we'll sit down and talk to someone who has an interesting story to tell. In this episode we hear from Paul Maleary, a former Murder Detective. Paul tells us incredible stories from his career and shows us where the TV shows are going wrong. In this episode we hear from John, a former heroin addict. John was addicted to heroin for over ten years. We hear him discuss the impact his addiction had on him and what happened to turn his life around.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode we hear from Mike, a paedophile hunter from the website Dark Light. Mike has been a paedophile hunter for the last 3 years, and has caught and confronted multiple offenders. Mike tells us how he got in to this line of work, and the things that parents can do to stop grooming before it happens. In this episode we hear from Leigh Coda, a male stripper. Leigh tells us about the tricks of the trade and what it feels like to take your clothes off in front of over 1000 people.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Aimen Dean, a former member of Al-Qaeda who turned his back on terrorism and joined the British Secret Service, tells us how he ended up joining Al-Qaeda, how he met Osama Bin Laden and what made him turn his back on the organisation.

programme.title: Extraordinary Lives: Episode 1
programme.desc: Douglas Robertson shares his incredible story of when he and his family were shipwrecked in the Pacific Ocean after their boat was attacked by a school of killer whales. They survived for 38 days in a dinghy with barely any food or drinking water.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: In this episode of LADbible's Agree to Disagree, F1 movie stars Brad Pitt and Damson Idris go head-to-head over some of the internet's biggest debates… and things get surprisingly heated on the topic of 90s vs modern fashion and even hot dogs!

programme.title: Agree to Disagree: Episode 44
programme.desc: World Darts Champion Luke Littler and Luke Humphries tackle some of sports' biggest debates. The two players discuss who has the better walk-on song? And should the PDC introduce a WWE Royal Rumble style darts tournament?

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Liverpool fan Paul Machin of The Redmen TV tells Man City fan, Big Steve, that he thinks Jurgen Klopp is a better manager than Pep Guardiola. Aguero's title-winning goal or Istanbul 2005 - which was the bigger moment?

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Flex tells Arsenal fan Pippa Monique that United's starting XI is better than Arsenal's.The pair debate the biggest arguments between the two classic Premier League rivals, including who will finish higher in the Premier League this season.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Comedians James Acaster and Ed Gamble, the hosts of the brilliant Off Menu podcast, enjoy a battle of Posh vs Normal food, and take a real trip down memory lane with some iconic British snacks. The results are hilarious! Florence Pugh compares American and British snacks and explains why she loves Branston Pickle so much, gets nostalgic drinking Ribena, and has a great time playing the BeanBoozled Jelly Belly game and eating some disgusting flavours!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Monkey Man director and producer Dev Patel and Jordan Peele pit Indian foods against their American counterparts, from pickle-in-a-pouch to poppadoms and chutney, and American and Indian cocktails, as well as tackling some spicy, spicy foods.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Simon Pegg and Pom Klementieff go head-to-head as they taste the weirdest, most wonderful corners of British and French cuisine, from dodging jellied eels to braving escargot and trying to decipher what on earth a Brain Licker is.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Timothée Chalamet and Austin Butler pit US and UK foods against each other to see who takes the ultimate title of reigning snack champion. The pair has a great time being introduced to British classics, and cause carnage trying a royal favourite! Millie Bobby Brown tackles meals from the UK and the US, including carrot cake, liquorice allsorts and energy drinks. The Stranger Things star compares Bovril to a Starbucks vanilla latte, and faces her biggest food gripe: quinoa.

programme.title: Honesty Box
programme.desc: Our audience asks convicted murderer O'fill Allen questions about how it feels to take somebody's life, why he committed the crime, his thoughts on prison life and the death penalty and whether he thinks anybody has the capacity to kill.

programme.title: Honesty Box
programme.desc: Ed reveals the most extreme thing he's done to survive, the most disgusting things he's eaten, and his most dangerous moments walking the Amazon. He also gives great survival tips and tells you why he would never drink Thames water!

programme.title: Honesty Box
programme.desc: Steve Backshall answers your burning questions about the extraordinary world of wildlife, with the help of some animal guests! Like, is a great white shark more terrifying than a saltwater crocodile? And what's the most dangerous animal in Britain?!

programme.title: Honesty Box
programme.desc: Louis Makepeace is a TikTok creator and car salesman who has dwarfism. In this episode, he clears up whether people should bend down to talk to someone with dwarfism and how he feels about a remake of Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this week's episode of Minutes With, we sat down with American veteran Chris VanSant as he takes us through his remarkable career in the Delta Force. Chris reveals the rigorous selection process required to join the elite force and takes us inside combat situations, explaining the complex operations that led to the capture of Saddam Hussein and the 'deck of cards' during the invasion of Iraq. Chris explains how death, loss and guilt caught up with him after years of service, leading to a moment that changed his life forever and set him on a new path.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty performs life-saving surgery on a mare, while Amy and the family work around-the-clock to bottle feed the mare's twin foals. Meanwhile, Georgie's new coach overhears Georgie confront Sam when she suspects her of sabotage during an Extreme Team practice, and Sam blames Georgie when she loses her headliner status. Forced together on a trail ride, Lou and Mitch come to terms with their mutual attraction and Lou reaches a decision about her future. Adam pushes Georgie to dig deep when she has to write an essay on her “most memorable moment.” And when the goldfish Tim buys for Katie suddenly dies, Tim and Jack struggle with how to break the news to her.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim is caught in the middle of Jade's showdown with a new hotshot bronc rider. Meanwhile, Georgie is feeling trapped in a rivalry of her own with Adam. Amy and Jack work with a top-flight bronc that has lost his mojo, while Ty faces a dilemma when a new professional passion project threatens to upend his life with Amy. And old feelings are rekindled when Casey enlists Tim's help with a new rodeo school student.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Amy and Ty reach a difficult decision about their future, the Heartland family grapples with the implications of their choice. Meanwhile, Georgie and Jade convince Tim to hire them to work at Maggie's, and Ty and Amy work together to save Casey's barrel racing horse.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When one of Tim's team-building events turns competitive, Georgie gets stuck partnering with Jade's cocky rival. Meanwhile, Amy and Cass have a falling out over Ty's partnership at the vet clinic until a close call forces them to reconcile. And Jack offers to help Tim with mounted orienteering in order to avoid lunch with Lisa's uppity aunt.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Amy helps a mounted archer reconnect with her horse, she also unravels the mystery behind Spartan's recent behavior. Meanwhile, Georgie is keen to tackle an exciting new challenge but her relationship with Adam is tested when he finds her spending time with another guy. Hoping they will finally have a chance to talk, Lou is surprised by Mitch's reaction when she unexpectedly descends on his solo fishing trip. And when Lisa accidentally throws out the key to his famous stew, Jack grows increasingly frustrated trying to recreate the recipe.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: As Amy and Ty prepare for parenthood, they work together to resolve a dangerous pregnancy issue. Meanwhile, Georgie may be forced to give up something she loves when a demanding new Extreme Team coach arrives on the scene. Then, Lou has to decide whether she should tackle a new business venture that may take her away from the Heartland family. When Jack and Mitch work together with the herd, Tim is not ready to be pushed aside. And Georgie and Adam find the perfect way to celebrate an anniversary.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Amy and Ty reach a difficult decision about their future, the Heartland family grapples with the implications of their choice. Meanwhile, Georgie and Jade convince Tim to hire them to work at Maggie's, and Ty and Amy work together to save Casey's barrel racing horse.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E40
programme.desc: Phoning from London, the Tates inform the Stephens that their governess has been taken ill. They ask Darrin and Samantha to care for the child until they return. Gladys Kravitz sees them leaving the house and returning with a baby. Assuming the Stephens' baby has arrived, Gladys congratulates Maurice, Samantha's father, on the birth of his grandson. Maurice is shocked to find the baby is not being taught witchcraft. He flies away with the child to the Warlock's Club in London. Meanwhile, the Tates arrive at the local airport. Darrin tries to stall while Samantha finds their baby. In London, after many tests, the Warlocks tell Maurice the baby "hasn't got it." Nanny Witch adds that the baby is a mortal like the father. At the Stephens home, Samantha and Darrin are about to tell the Tates their baby is missing, when Maurice arrives with the child. Maurice's pride is restored when Samantha tells him her baby is not due for several months. Arriving with a present, Gladys is told to wait until Samantha's baby is born. Before vanishing through a wall, Maurice hands Gladys a martini. Watching Gladys down it, Samantha hopes she will not remember what she has seen and heard.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E23
programme.desc: The lack of a traffic signal at busy Morning Glory Circle makes it virtually impossible for the Stephens or their neighbors to cross without risking life and limb. Joe Harvey calls a meeting at his home to discuss plans for doing something about it. Darrin makes an ad for a mass rally at the school auditorium to force City Hall to put a traffic light on the corner. However, Samantha has trouble getting Endora to return the traffic signals she has collected. Endora even brings a London bobby to the Stephens' living room. The bobby, of course, has disappeared by the time Gladys Kravitz brings her husband to see him. At the rally, the Mayor tells his constituents a traffic light is unnecessary. However, using her witchcraft, Samantha has the Mayor and his limousine so tied up in a traffic jam that he is convinced a traffic signal is necessary. Endora, as a final touch, brings a modern traffic signal to the Stephens home for the victory celebration. Gladys sees it, but by the time she brings Abner, Samantha makes Endora cause it to vanish.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E24
programme.desc: Samantha tells Endora she doesn't have time for a dress-fitting. Endora solves Samantha's problem by transforming herself into En-Sam, identical to Samantha. Bob Frazer, an author, falls for En-Sam and they do the town together. Meanwhile, Darrin tells Samantha to expect a visit from his friend, Bob Frazer. Gladys Kravitz, who has seen En-Sam with Bob, is sure the Stephens home is about to break up. After Bob sees Samantha and mistakes her for En-Sam, Samantha explains to Endora the trouble she is causing. Endora is convinced when she learns Bob is expected at the Stephens home. All of En-Sam's efforts to break with Bob fail. Bob is determined to have a showdown with Darrin over Samantha. Samantha tells Darrin that Bob has fallen in love with Endora. Endora, still En-Sam, arrives and Bob thinks En-Sam and Samantha are identical twins. Although Endora promises to give Bob Up, Samantha, knowing her mother, is not sure what she will do.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E25
programme.desc: Samantha and Gladys Kravitz become aware of their husbands' interest in Priscilla "Pleasure" O'Riley, a beautiful model, when she buys a house next door. Pleasure is hiding from Thor "Thunderbolt" Swenson, an offensive fullback who has threatened mayhem if he sees her with another man. Darrin becomes involved in Pleasure's affairs after he helps her move in. One night, Pleasure wakes up the Stephens. Telling them that Thunderbolt has learned her new address, she pleads for Darrin's protection. Thunderbolt arrives and Samantha inadvertently gives him the impression that Darrin is Pleasure's new boyfriend. Darrin is saved from Thunderbolt's wrath when Samantha turns him into the image of his grandmother. Then, certain that Abner is the man, Thunderbolt knocks him out and is arrested. Gladys hits the headlines when the newspapers mistakenly single her out as the object of Thunderbolt's jealousy. Pleasure's lawyer gets a court order to keep Thunderbolt away. However, Pleasure accepts Thunderbolt's offer to drive her to the Mayor's office where she is to pose as "Miss Urban Renewal."

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E26
programme.sub-title: Driving Is The Only Way To Fly
programme.desc: After a violent argument while he is teaching her to drive, Darrin enrolls Samantha in a driving school. Basil Koenig assigns his brother-in-law Harold, one of humanity's leading nervous wrecks, to teach Samantha. Time after time, Samantha uses witchcraft to get the dual-controlled car out of catastrophic predicaments. Harold finally breaks when he hears Endora's voice from the back seat and is unable to see her. Harold leaves Samantha, Endora, and the car and heads for a psychiatrist. Feeling responsible, Samantha takes Darrin to the school to keep Harold from losing his job. Matters get more complicated when Darrin tries to explain Endora's unseen presence. Although Koenig has already fired Harold, he rehires him when Samantha threatens to go to another driving school. After Darrin learns Samantha has cured Harold's nervousness by getting him to join a class in basket weaving, Darrin decides to join, too.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E27
programme.sub-title: There's No Witch Like An Old Witch
programme.desc: Age has played havoc with Aunt Clara's witchcraft. Unable to fly great distances any longer, she is forced to give up a trip to Miami with the other witches. Samantha invites her to stay at the Stephens' home while they are away. All of Aunt Clara's efforts to help around the house prove disastrous. To cheer her up, Samantha and Darrin take her along for an evening on the town with the Caldwells. However, when the babysitter does not arrive, Aunt Clara insists on substituting. Aunt Clara's magic tricks delight Jimmy Caldwell, age six, so much that other families clamor for her services. However Agnes Bain complains when she learns that Aunt Clara has told the children she is a witch and they believe her. Aunt Clara receives a court order restraining her from further babysitting until she reports to Judge Virgil Winner for a hearing. Winner is so impressed by Aunt Clara that he asks her to babysit with his son. Aunt Clara's booming business is cut short, however, when the Stephens send her to Florida by train to join her friends.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E28
programme.desc: Inspired by a demonstration of an electric garage door, Samantha opens her garage by twitching her nose. Plagued by Gladys about this, Abner questions Darrin. To cover up, Darrin foregoes new fishing gear and buys a remote control for the garage. When radio signals from passing planes operate the door at random, Samantha asks Darrin to return the device and use the money for fishing gear. Darrin refuses to believe Samantha and she swears never to use magic again. Later, Samantha and Darrin are trapped when a plane signal locks the garage. While Samantha stands by her vow, refusing Darrin's request to open the door, a plane flies overhead. Darrin and Samantha quarrel when he accuses her of using magic again, but when the door flies open, Gladys and Abner see Samantha and Darrin embracing. Although Darrin is finally convinced, he has trouble explaining matters to the Kravitzes. Abner and Gladys buy a remote control, too. While demonstrating it, Gladys plows right through her garage door.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E29
programme.desc: Gladys Kravitz catches Samantha twitching her nose to rearrange pictures on a wall. To keep Gladys from spreading the news, Samantha convinces her that she has extrasensory perception. Gladys starts using her supposed powers on Abner. Everything goes wrong, especially when she tries to make the rain stop. Samantha tells Gladys that supernatural powers can come and go and that Gladys' have probably gone forever. Later, when Gladys makes a scene in a supermarket, claiming the place is in grave danger, Samantha proposes a séance, hoping to scare the daylights out of Gladys. During the séance, Samantha produces an apparition which looks like a relative of Gladys', and Abner becomes frightened. Gladys tells her husband to "dry up" and Samantha changes him into a pile of ashes. When Samantha directs Gladys to swear off magic forever to get Abner back, she does so. Later, Gladys gets the same idea as Abner about going to a movie, and feels that possibly she still has the power.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E30
programme.desc: Darrin lends a helping hand to D. D. (Danger) O'Riley, a beautiful nineteen-year-old neighbor. As Darrin spends more and more time with D.D., Samantha turns to solitaire. Endora sees a chance to break up the Stephens marriage. She takes George, a warlock, from his harem and persuades him to romance Samantha. Learning George's purpose, Samantha declares she is perfectly happy married to Darrin. Undaunted, George, in the form of a raven, flies to Darrin's office, where Darrin and Larry Tate are working on a campaign for an electric typewriter. George flies into the room and begins to type on the new machine. Darrin and Larry feel the raven is the perfect image for a series of T.V. commercials. When Samantha tells Darrin who George really is, George materializes into human form and gets mixed up for awhile with D.D. Endora is miffed. When realizing that his witchcraft is powerless against the love Samantha and Darrin have for each other, George returns to his harem.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E32
programme.desc: After an argument, Gladys Kravitz locks her husband out of their home. The Stephens invite Abner to spend the night at their place. Later, when it appears that Abner, using all his privileges as a guest, is more than satisfied with the arrangements and is making no effort to return to his own home, Darrin demands that Samantha take action. Not only is Samantha unsuccessful in all her attempts to effect a reconciliation, but she learns that Gladys wants a divorce. When all else fails, Samantha gets the idea of using sleep therapy to reunite the Kravitzes. Feeling that one of the happiest days of her life is the day a man proposes marriage, and a woman accepts him, Samantha projects Gladys and Abner in their dreams back to that day. Then she awakens them and each begins looking for the other. Later, as Samantha and Darrin look forward to spending an evening at home alone, the Kravitzes arrive to celebrate their reunion.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E33
programme.desc: As Darrin naps in the living room, Endora points out some of the unfortunate details of his face. Samantha at first protests when her mother, using witchcraft, changes Darrin's looks but then adds some touches of her own. Awakening, Darrin demands an explanation. Samantha can't explain why she and Endora were changing his features, and Darrin begins to worry. As the obsession grows, Samantha decides to build up her husband's ego. Changing her own personality, Samantha becomes a French sculptress, Michelle. She tells Darrin his face exudes the masculine appeal she has always tried to find in a model. Darrin turns down Michelle's request that he pose for her, suspecting that she is Samantha. A substitute secretary, Barbara Lucas, appears at the office and Darrin, thinking it is another of Samantha's tricks, makes a play for her, just as Samantha walks in. Her jealous reaction convinces Darrin that Samantha really loves him. Darrin explains be thought she was posing as Barbara, but leaves Samantha with an uncertain feeling.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E35
programme.desc: Samantha and Endora discover the culinary delights of Mario's restaurant. Mario tells them he is going broke because he refuses to sell pizza. Samantha learns that Darrin's agency has a new client, Linton Baldwin, the owner of a large chain of pizza parlors. When Samantha uses witchcraft to get a huge newspaper ad for Mario, and Endora inserts a plug for him on Baldwin's TV program, Baldwin tells Larry Tate he is cancelling his account and signing with the agency handling Mario's restaurant. Realizing Darrin's career is in jeopardy, Samantha persuades Endora to help save the Baldwin account for Darrin. They lay out a spectacular advertising campaign for Baldwin and give the credit to Darrin's agency. Not only does Baldwin ask Darrin's agency to keep his account, but Mario's restaurant becomes a great success.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E36
programme.desc: Almost as determined as Endora to break up Samantha's marriage to a mere mortal, Samantha's cousin Edgar, an elf, begins playing pranks on Darrin. Darrin's agency has been trying to hold onto the Shelley Shoe account. Edgar, invisible to all, plagues Darrin in his office. Darrin is sure Endora is working on him again, and has difficulty persuading Larry Tate to let him present the new campaign to Mr. Shelley. At the sales meeting, Fred Schulwiler, as unscrupulous competitor, almost gets the account when he makes it appear that Darrin is trying to make Mr. Shelley look ridiculous. When Samantha convinces Edgar that she is very happy with Darrin, he switches his attentions to Schulwiler. Before Edgar is through, Schulwiler has lost all chance of landing the Shelley account. Darrin, coming up with an advertising campaign featuring an elf not unlike Edgar, ties up the account for his firm.

programme.desc: In the pivotal struggle for WWII victory, the race to develop the first atomic bomb was critical to secure world dominance now, experts reveal new evidence behind Nazi Germany's top-secret and cutting-edge development of catastrophic nuclear weapons.

programme.title: Misty Experiment, The: The Secret Battle for the Ho Chi Minh Trail
programme.desc: A top-secret operation in Vietnam with tough pilots facing psychological challenges and their crucial roles.

programme.title: Shanghai 1937: Where World War II Began
programme.desc: The text explores the key figures of the Battle of Shanghai, its three-month duration, subsequent war years

programme.title: The Coming War On China
programme.desc: John Pilger reveals how the world's greatest military power, the US, may well be on the road to war with China

programme.title: Wings: World War II in the Skies
programme.desc: WWII pilots and engineers battled with Spitfires, Hurricanes, Zeros, Hellcats, ME 109s, and more.

programme.title: Wings: World War II in the Skies
programme.desc: The "Hell Hawks" fight in D-Day's skies, while the Avenger sinks Japan's largest battleship.

programme.title: Untold
programme.desc: During WWII, the UK faced bombings, including the Blitz, V1/V2 rockets, and butterfly bombs in 1943.

programme.title: Air Wars
programme.desc: Computer graphics and combat footage highlight the crucial role of Allied aircraft

programme.title: Class of '92: Full Time
programme.desc: After a poor start, Salford's chances of automatic promotion are faltering, and they are in danger of missing the play-offs. Meanwhile, the Class of '92 are reunited.

programme.title: Chronicles of a Champion Golfer
programme.desc: A look at one of The Open's great champions. Here, the focus is on Paul Lawrie, who famously won The Open at Carnoustie in 1999 after a sensational comeback in the final round.

programme.title: Chronicles of a Champion Golfer
programme.desc: A look at one of The Open's great champions. Here, the focus is on American Phil Mickelson, who won his sole Championship in 2013 at Muirfield Golf Links.

programme.title: Gary Neville's Soccer Box
programme.desc: Gary Neville sits down with Sol Campbell as they relive some of the most compelling matches that the two shared during their storied careers.

programme.title: Gary Neville's Soccer Box
programme.desc: Gary Neville sits down with former Liverpool striker Robbie Fowler to discuss their time in the game and some of the most notable matches in which they played.

programme.title: Sporting Heroes
programme.desc: Gary Newbon interviews former wheelchair racer Tanni Grey-Thompson about her prolific career. Grey- Thompson won a remarkable 11 gold medals at the Paralympic Games.

programme.title: Class of '92: Full Time
programme.desc: Despite a new manager and a new-look squad, Salford City don't start the season like the expected promotion favourites. The Class of '92 make a big announcement. Strong language.

programme.title: Class of '92: Full Time
programme.desc: After a poor start, Salford's chances of automatic promotion are faltering, and they are in danger of missing the play-offs. Meanwhile, the Class of '92 are reunited.

programme.title: The Open Championship Official Film
programme.desc: A chance to relive The 2017 Open at Royal Birkdale. Sweden's Henrik Stenson came in as the defending champion from 2016's tournament at Royal Troon.

programme.title: Wild Sex
programme.desc: Sex is at the heart of everything. It's the only real way of leaving a legacy - in the genes of the future. But there's more than just the act - it's the build up to it when wildlife shows its incredible diversity. It drives touching courtships and fierce battles. Hormones and sex drive are forces that shape behaviour and can change an animal's purpose and persona. This is the story of how wild things get sexy.

programme.title: Wild Dolphins
programme.desc: In the waters surrounding New Zealand live a number of dolphin species - each of which has evolved unique strategies in their family pods to survive and thrive in the different habitats around these islands in the Pacific Ocean. On the east coast of the south island off the iconic Kaikoura peninsula, an underwater canyon pushes water seething with nutrients to the surface which provides a year round banquet for huge pods of dusky dolphins. These athletic and highly social dolphins spend their nights feeding out in the canyon, and in early morning they return closer to shore where they rest socialize and play. One of their favourite activities is the “seaweed game” where individuals pass pieces of seaweed to each other practicing fancy maneuvers where they'll catch it on their tail, dorsal or pectoral fins. Down in the south west corner of New Zealand in the majestic landscape of Fiordland live the southern-most bottlenose dolphins. At almost 4 metres long these dolphins have adapted physically to the extreme winter conditions down here by growing bigger and fatter with extra insulating blubber and evolving stubbier beaks and shorter fins and tail flukes to reduce heat loss through their extremities. These fiords are different to the coastal environment in that freshwater sits on top of the denser seawater in a distinct layer, and is much colder than the saltwater and can prove lethal to the pods' calves in winter, so every year the bottlenose dolphins make a short migration to the outer fiords where there is less freshwater to enable their calves to survive. Off New Zealand's north island, in the middle of the Bay of Plenty, the country's most active volcano erupts from the sea, sending plumes of toxic gases rising skywards. In the water surrounding this volcano roam common dolphins - the nomads of the dolphin world. They are pelagic predators which mean they roam the open ocean searching for prey.

programme.title: Eagle Queen of the Skies
programme.desc: Eagles are top predators who battle fiercely for survival and work hard to raise their young. There are 60 members of the eagle clan, all united by their acute eyesight, powerful wings, sharp talons and hooked beaks. To explore the world of the eagle we follow one individual from hatching to leaving the nest and setting up a home. Her fight for survival reveals what it takes to become a queen of the sky.

programme.title: Eagle Lakes
programme.desc: The Lauenburg Lake District is located between Lübeck and Lauenburg on the River Elbe. With more than 470 square kilometres, it is the third largest natural reserve in Schleswig-Holstein. Due to its extensive forest areas, 40 lakes and its proximity to Mecklenburg's biosphere reserve Lake Schalsee, it forms the largest protectoral area alongside the former inner-German border.

programme.title: Anaconda Wanted
programme.desc: Anacondas have fired people's imagination since time immemorial. Hardly any other animal is so feared and yet at the same time so revered as the biggest snake in the world.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: The gallery forests of the Serengeti are the realm of a phantom. The shadowy thickets are the domain of a Leopardess.

programme.title: Haunted Huntress
programme.desc: A brook in the Serengeti is the home of a leopardess. The secret queen of the shadows took care of her son and has done a good job so far but the adventure continues.

programme.title: Design Me a Superhuman Army
programme.desc: Evil Genius orders his minions to create a superhuman army. Scientists look into gene editing, mind control and ways to make humans faster, stronger and more obedient.

programme.title: Time
programme.desc: Jack meets a woman who has lost all sense of time and reveals how time can be elastic.

programme.title: Creativity

programme.desc: This investigation focuses on some friends of Brian's whose home is a deconsecrated 19th century church.

programme.desc: TAPS investigates an armory in New Bedford, Mass. A camera detects a warm mist passing in front of the lens.

programme.title: Fortuna & Topton

programme.title: Cranston & Grafton
programme.desc: TAPS helps a family whose young children claim to be tormented by ghosts.

programme.desc: TAPS is called back to New Orleans for a case with a female spirit who won't leave the male homeowner alone.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: There is a heart stopping moment for the team when something goes wrong with gibbon Kitty, and Saki monkey Chloe meets an over ardent suitor.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: A new baby woolly enters the world, while there's sadness over the passing of one of the park's most iconic characters.

programme.title: Monkey Life

programme.title: Monkey Life

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Chimp Gypsy is very unwell, Dodger the capuchin meets some new ladies and chimp Bart has eyes for just one thing.

programme.desc: A health check for newly rescued tamarin Red raises alarm, newcomer capuchin Matty squares up to dominant male Erico and the chimps get a tasty treat.

programme.desc: Top male Paulo protests a woolly weigh in, the siamang gibbons have a new experience and the capuchins use some clever tricks to track down some tasty treats.

programme.desc: A huge storm pummels the park leaving a trail of destruction in its wake, and there's friction at Stumpie House as Toto and Freddie fight for the top spot.

programme.title: Monkey Life

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Investigate released documents regarding alien and UFO encounters, made accessible to the public in 2011 by the Freedom of Information Act. We investigate mass UFO sightings, personal abductions, government cover-ups and breaking alien news from around the world. We delve into the "photoshopping" of space, the value of Wikileaks, and the role social media plays in alien stories.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: In another cruel twist Cleo's young pup Ophelia got left behind on a foraging trip and was killed by one of the Kalahari's most dangerous creatures, a Goshawk. The remaining three pups: Zeus, Daisy and Flo have lost their dear sister and playmate and this is causing high levels of insecurity.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: The Gosa Gang have recently moved to a new home known as Fortress burrow. It is close to the Gosa Dam where a rival family of meerkats live.In the quest for territorial dominance there has been a major meerkat standoff. This has resulted in both gangs losing a member of their tribe.

programme.title: Our Big Blue Backyard
programme.desc: As the tide rises in New Zealand's Northland Harbours, Stingrays and Eagle rays swim in to feast on shellfish. But they are not the top of the food chain. Only in New Zealand, and only in these harbours do Orca hunt rays. Trapped in the shallows, the rays breach the surface and swim for their lives, as the Orca pursue – with a highly evolved practice for avoiding the rays' stinging tail. As the tide ebbs, the once underwater world of Northland's mangroves surfaces and seethes. Twisted roots that moments ago sheltered fish are now exposed - a seafood platter for patient Herons, Spoonbills, and Shags.

programme.title: Our Big Blue Backyard
programme.desc: Just north of New Zealand's biggest city, tens of thousands of fish school meters from the beach in one of the world's first marine reserves. Inside the Goat Island Reserve giant snapper can live for eighty years and crayfish grow to weigh 8 kilos. Both feed on the thousands of sea urchins that graze the kelp forest, maintaining a delicately balanced ecosystem. Like many of the reserve's inhabitants, they entrust their larvae to the ocean currents - so how do they find their way back to the reef when they take on their adult form and settle down?

programme.title: Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: The cubs get their first taste of meat and after a shocking discovery, one of the cubs is rushed to the vet. To make matters worse, the construction of the new center might be plagued by even more delays.

programme.title: Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: Ambassador Joseph is running late to an important meet and greet. The foxes and the meerkats are getting wild. Then, tragedy strikes the cervals along with a mounting tension along the fence lines of the center.

programme.title: Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: While one cheetah recovers form dental surgery, another loses her appetite. Annie visits an old guard dog.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: The rains have finally arrived in the Kalahari and the vast desert has never looked better. Cleo, the boss of this small group of wild meerkats has given birth to five new pups

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The wide, often untouched wilderness of the Baltic hinterland is home to many animals. More than 35 brown bears live in the primeval forests of Alutaguse. In the spring, the Soomaa National Park transforms into a huge lake. Europe's widest waterfall is located in Latvia. In the beginning of May, vimba bream follow the course of the River Venta. The hardly 5-centimetre-long fish have to overcome a 4-metre-long rock barrier in order to reach their spawning grounds.

programme.title: Wild Bavaria
programme.desc: The moon disappears behind the horizon and the stage is set for a new day in the Alps of Berchtesgaden.

programme.title: Wild Bavaria
programme.desc: Mighty and mysterious, King Watzmann sits above Germany's only alpine national park.

programme.title: Lions On The Move
programme.desc: Kevin Richardson shares an extraordinary bond with Africa's most fearsome predators. Together with them, he has experienced some real adventures. However, transporting 27 lions and 14 hyenas to a new home presents a different challenge.The lions' new home will be a sanctuary on the edge of Dinokeng, a South African game reserve spanning 18,000 square metres. The huge task ahead includes planning and designing the new enclosures, and securing permits to move the animals.

programme.title: Lions On The Move
programme.desc: Not only are the animals regularly rotated into new enclosures to prevent repetitive behaviour developing out of boredom, but Kevin also has to practice loading them in and out of the van. Can the reluctant lions and hyenas eventually be persuaded to get on board with the move?

programme.title: Elephants: Back to the Wild
programme.desc: We follow the rescue of a baby elephant. Once rescued, it will be transported by plane to the breeding station and raised with love and commitment. In order to satisfy the little pachyderm's urge to move while in the breeding station, there is sometimes an adorable football match between the animals.

programme.title: Elephants: Back to the Wild
programme.desc: We accompany the first steps of a two-year-old elephant who is just starting his release program. We also observe the story of two young elephants in their first night in the wilderness on their own. Captivating film footage allows us to truly learn how elephants behave in the wild.

programme.title: Super Senses

programme.title: Super Senses

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are back in Germany, with the world record breakers. We promise you this is going to be amazing. Do not move from that seat, because we are going to see some records smashed today. Over 6 cruel events, you will see who gets crowned of the King Of The Castle!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: With the next episode of Strongman Champions League Germany. Its the world record breakers, and in the last show we set two new records. Can more be records be broken before the king of the castle is crowned?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Kokkola in Finland. This city will be the setting for the Lightweight World championship. Out of 24 athletes, only 16 will make it through to the final day, but who will champion each event and who is going to be eliminated?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Its the second day, and the top 16 athletes have made it through to the final round. With another 4 events to go who will get the crown of world champion?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Ukraine and the wonderful capital city of Kyiv. Were here for the second time for the iconic truck pull World Championships! The reigning World champion Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland will defend his title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this episode, a final chance for our athletes to get vital world series ranking points on board to give them the best possible chance of success and an initial advantage at the finals. It's the last show before the world finals and the top 10 places are up for grabs, but who will they be?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkeys south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season. Here in the sunshine, well finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is - you could not ask for a better setting. programme.title: SUHO 'Who Are You' MV
programme.desc: EXO's Suho has released his fourth mini-album Who Are You. The title track, Who Are You, is an alternative rock song that combines raw-toned electric guitar and bass with a catchy melody. The lyrics capture the moment of parting, calmly facing the flow of farewell that can be felt even without clear words. The song is available in both Korean and English versions.

programme.title: SUHO 'Medicine' MV
programme.desc: 'Medicine' is a retro-inspired indie pop track featuring a disco backbeat and rhythmic riffs. Its witty lyrics capture attention with the message that the only cure for the fever of love is you.

programme.title: HAECHAN 'CRZY' MV
programme.desc: NCT HAECHAN's first solo title track 'CRZY' is an R&B pop dance song with early 2000s hip-hop funk rhythms and catchy vocals. The lyrics depict a playful push-and-pull with someone he meets by chance. In the music video, HAECHAN confidently tries to win the person over in an art museum. The contrast between the calm setting and his bold attitude enhances the song's charm.

programme.title: HAECHAN The 1st Album 'TASTE'
programme.desc: 11. Outro (Back In The Studio)NCT Haechan has released his first solo album 「TASTE」, featuring 11 tracks including the title song *CRZY*. The album highlights Haechan's unique musical color, built around his favorite genre, R&B, and expands into diverse moods of soul, hip-hop, and jazz. The title 「TASTE」 carries a dual meaning: sharing the musical “tastes” Haechan has cultivated from his childhood dream of becoming a singer to the present, and inviting listeners to “taste” the very first music he has created as a solo artist. Through this album, fans can fully experience Haechan's world of music. 7. Talented [Track List] 6. Intermission 5. Roll With Me 2. CRZY 1. Camera Lights 8. WYN? (Feat. HAON) 9. Should Be 3. ADRENALINE 10. Grey Rain 4. Love Beyond

programme.title: Sweet Dreams

programme.title: Animal Sounds
programme.desc: This show blends fun and learning by introducing kids to a musical world where animals take center stage. With catchy tunes, children explore songs about pets and wildlife, fostering care and empathy while enjoying an universe of music and adventure!

programme.desc: This show helps kids develop motor skills with fun morning exercise songs, boosting health and happiness. The lively lyrics inspire kids and parents to stay active, making mornings a joyful and healthy start for the whole family!

programme.title: Good Morning, Sunshine!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance an up and down dance. They watch some children painting pictures and patterns on to eggs. In Teletubbyland, Laa-Laa dances with her ball until the magical tree appears.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little boy show us how to make a Turban. The Tubbies go for a walk, but Po, Laa-Laa and Dipsy want to play with their favourite things.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and teaches the Teletubbies a nursery rhyme. Then they watch Becky go for a ride on a Tram. Po rides her scooter too fast and knocks the other Tubbies over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch some children are playing football in the park. Laa-Laa and Po love playing with the ball. While they play they sing a song about the ball.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up from behind a hill to watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty sausage. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Po go for a walk, so Laa-Laa decides to dance a secret dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number three. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa go for a walk. They count three trees and three flowers and Po follows behind counting too.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep when a voice trumpet appears singing the rhyme 'Frére Jacques'. The Teletubbies laugh and call "Again, again!"

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two boys make Chinese Lanterns with their uncle. In Teletubbyland, it is time for Tubby Toast, but where has Laa-Laa's toast gone?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and some children learn about the colour blue. In Teletubbyland Po is watching the blue sky when it begins to rain.

programme.desc: Noo-Noo tidies up Home hill before the Teletubbies slide up the slide to watch Natalie tell us about her brother's christening.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: The Cat takes Sally and Nick to Machine-a-Ma-Zoo where they learn how a lever can solve their problem. Then, in Gongolia, they find out that bigger things make lower sounds.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Sally keeps getting found when they play Hide and Seek. Cat takes them to Tagaloo to meet a great seeker. Then, Cat takes them to the Hole-Lot-of Funhouse.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: When Nick's magic trick causes his toy car to disappear under the porch, the Cat takes them to Arcade Island to win a Grasper-ma-clasper. Then, Cat takes them to Coldsnap Island.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Nick and Sally can't agree on the "right" way to sort their toys. The Cat takes them to Toborrowland. Then, the kids are making bubbles and want to save one for Sally's mum but they always pop!

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: When Nick's water glass suddenly falls over without anyone touching it, Cat comes to help them solve the mystery. Then, Cat takes them to the Jingly Jungle for a concert by the great Vibrato.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Nick and Sally's soccer game is obstructed by a large log that they can't lift out of the way. Then, Nick's new plane is flying well but is a little dull so the kids add buttons and glitter.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Cat shrinka-ma-doodles them so they're small enough to be in the train set. Then, Cat takes Sally and Nick to a place where they can get more sticks.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Sally is convinced that a tall thin glass of juice holds more than a short wide glass so Cat takes them to Point O'View. Then, Nick and Sally wonder if they can walk on a cloud.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Sally invents a secret treehouse handshake but Nick can't remember the sequence. The Cat takes them to Over-and-Overton. Then, The Cat says he needs their help to move some big pictures.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: The Cat takes Sally and Nick to Lots-o-Lakes Land to see the flight of the Dipsydoodlers. Then, Sally and Nick have wrapped Father's Day gifts but they get mixed up and can't tell which is which!

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Nick and Sally are trying to build a sandcastle but the sand is either too dry or too wet. Then, Cat takes them to The Bazaar at Balance Point.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: When Nick and Sally's boat sinks, they need to build another boat, but don't know how. Then, in Spansylvania, they meet a dragon who chases after them!

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: The Cat takes Sally and Nick to meet Sara of Serendip, an inventor who helps them understand that you can make new discoveries through your mistakes. Then, the Cat takes them to the Soundy Sea.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: The kids want to get a trunk up into the treehouse and go to the Machine-a-Ma-Zoo, where they're introduced to simple machines. Then, Sally loses her "slidiness"!

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Fright Knight
programme.desc: Using the Book of Fear, Jestro calls forth Whipperella and uses her to trap the knights in the dark woods where they realize their darkest fears. Searching through the dark forests of the realm, Jestro finds “The Book of Fear.” It's pretty scary. But he feeds it to the book of Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, a monster that can induce fear. One-by-one she uses her “knighmarish” power on the knights and they experiences their own worst fears. Clay fears not living up to the Knights' Code. Lance fears being a nobody. Macy fears never being a knight and Axl fears having no food. Aaron must take the lead because he's fearless he does everything with reckless abandon. It's not until he leads the group out of the forest – as they fight off the Whipperella – that they we find out Aaron's true fear – the fear of peace and quiet and no more challenges or high energy escapades.

programme.title: The Golden Castle
programme.desc: When Lance is cast as the star in the new remake of the classic movie “Ned Knightly and the Golden Castle” he doesn't anticipate Jestro and his monsters invading the set and ruining his starring role. It's movie time! Lance does something very Lance: he agrees to star in a movie about remake of a classic film in Knighton: “The Golden Castle.” While pillaging a village, Jestro and the Book of Monsters see a movie poster for “The Golden Castle” and the book says the legendary Golden Castle is filled with riches! Jestro explains that it's just a dumb movie and that it's not real. It's all based on a “script.” The Book, who's been shelved for many years, wants to eat the movie script to learn more about the modern world. On the set of the movie, Lance has invited the other Knights to act as extras. When they see how Lance is being portrayed, they're incensed. When Jestro attacks the movie set to get the script for his book to eat, the film director keeps rolling. This battle footage is fantastic! The Knights defeat Jestro even though the movie set is trashed. The director will make it work. At the premier of the movie, Lance is embarrassed to see that he's been reduced to comic relief for the realm's bravest Knight…Macy! The director has now made her a star.

programme.title: The Maze Of Amazement
programme.desc: The Knights find themselves trapped in a maze looking for the Book of Deception. But will they actually get their hands on it, or will it keep deceiving them? The Knights travel to the Hill Country in the northern part of Knighton to Axl's home town of DIGGINGTON (where they realize that all of Axl's family look just like him.) While they're there, Merlok 2.0 detects something…one of the Magic Books! It's “The Book of Deception.” They go to find it and discover it ended up under a mountain. And, to make matters worse, the magic book has built a maze around itself to keep it from being found (it is deceptive!) As the NEXO-Knights enter the maze from one side, Jestro enters from the other the Book of Monsters has led him to the maze to get The Book of Deception, too. It's a race through this confusing maze to see who can get the book first. Ava figures out the maze is the Whackman maze from a videogame. After help from Axl's people to defeat Jestro and win the book, the knights discover it's a FAKE BOOK of deception. The Book of Deception created a fake copy of itself!

programme.title: The Black Knight
programme.desc: It seems the NEXO-Knights are attacking villages throughout the realm! But why? A mysterious Black Knight appears to defend the cities from the rogue NEXO-villains! Jestro, happy he has the REAL Book of Deception, uses it to create bad versions of the NEXO-Knights. The “fake” knights then attack villages and hamlets. When the real NEXO-Knights arrive, they're booed and pelted with food. Why does everyone hate them? To make matters more confusing, a giant Mech Suit in black – The BLACK KNIGHT – appears to defend the kingdom's villages from the fake knights. The Black Knight ends up being very powerful and throws Jestro and his fake knights for a loop. He's cool and mysterious. But when the fake Knights get the better of him, the REAL NEXO-Knights appear to fend them off and learn their deceptive secret. The Knights save the Black Knight and they open him up to find…young ROBIN! (He used a deep, deceptive voice.) The Knights realize that Robin has potential. But maybe he still has some learning to do.

programme.title: Chased Dreamers
programme.desc: To craft their own hourglasses and become official Dream Chasers for the Night Bureau, Mateo and his friends must defeat the Dream Forge guardian.

programme.title: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: Legendary Places, Ninjago's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Country Girls
programme.desc: When the girls go to Mia's grandparents' ranch and Olivia accidentally knocks down the neighbor's barn, the girls promise to raise money to rebuild it and now have to learn to set aside their differences and work together to make good on their promise. Mia invites her friends to her grandparents' ranch for the weekend. But when Olivia accidentally knocks down a neighbor's barn with a tractor, the girls promise to raise the money to rebuild it themselves. Complicating matters, Mia and Stephanie turn out to like the same boy, Martin. They'll have to learn to set aside their differences and work together if they're going to raise enough money to make good on their promise.

programme.title: Emma's Dilemma
programme.desc: When Stephanie becomes obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in a float building contest and accidentally disregards Emma's ideas and design, Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to get revenge on Stephanie. When the girls enter a float-building contest, Emma is especially excited to share her design idea for the float. But no one is listening to her, especially Stephanie, who's become obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in the contest. Emma finally does find someone who appreciates her design… Tanya! Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to build the float design. But is Tanya just using Emma to get revenge on Stephanie?

programme.title: Friends of The Jungle
programme.desc: When Olivia's Aunt Sophie is getting married and the groom has gone missing in the jungle, the girls fly out to the jungle in secret to try to find him in time for the wedding. The girls are super excited to be planning a wedding for Olivia's Aunt Sophie. There's just one little problem: Olivia learns that the groom has gone missing in the jungle while working at an animal rescue station! Not wanting to worry her aunt, Olivia, Stephanie and Mia secretly fly to the jungle to try and find the groom, Henry, rescuing a few animals along the way. Too bad Emma and Andrea couldn't keep the secret back in Heartlake City. Now, Sophie, Emma and Andrea join the others in the jungle to try and find Henry before the rapidly approaching wedding date!

programme.title: Can Of Worms
programme.desc: Lloyd moves in and tries to make nice by helping out with chores, but he just gets in the way. Pythor has awoken the Vipoids and the Constrictaurs and an all out snake war has taken over Ninjago. The Ninja are not faring well, when a mysterious Samurai shows up and saves the day.

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship ‘The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become ‘The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: It started out as an experiment and became a brutal lesson in survival.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Kup hides a war story he refuses to tell, unlike the others.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime returns from death, making Rodimus proud.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Cyclonus and the Sweeps chase the traitor, Octane into the heart of Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Octane and Trypticon conspire to help the greedy King Fakaddi.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: Forever is a Long Time Coming
programme.desc: The Quintessons embark on a time-traveling mission to change their history.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Wheelie and Daniel plan a risky birthday party for Ultra Magnus.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Grimlock and Daniel are accidentally transported into a dimension of wizards and warriors.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. Optimus Prime and Autobots protect the AllSpark, clashing with Decepticons on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: Home Is Where The Spark Is
programme.desc: Autobots' new base in an old car plant reveals assembly line machinery with a mind of its own.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A genius uses Bumblebee's fluid, turning into Meltdown with a deadly, corrosive touch.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Professor Sumdac's upgraded animatronic dinosaurs turn rogue, becoming rampaging Dinobots.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Alexis, Rad and Carlos introduce themselves to Optimus Prime, Hot Rod and First Aid.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The kids join the Autobots on a mission to find a newly awakened Minicon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: In Antarctica, Starscream loses a Minicon to an unexpected thief.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurf Who Would Be King: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Most Unsmurfy Games: To prove the worth of his Big Book of Wilderness Survival, Brainy takes the Smurflings to the swamp. Where, thanks to his expert advice, the tiny group gets totally lost, is then caught in quicklime and trapped by King Bullrush of the Wartmongers. Fortunately, Bullrush is in a playful mood and devises a Smurf hunt. Unfortunately, Brainy believes he is a born leader...

programme.title: Revenge Of The Smurfs
programme.desc: A war is raging in the Middle Ages. Knights in armor in hot pursuit inadvertently destroy the Smurfs Village so a small band of Smurfs decide to avenge this wrongdoing. Won't Papa Smurf think this is too human-like a reaction?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Giant: Simon is lost in the forest and in search of his parents. Simon is the son of a couple of giants. The Smurfs try to bring him home, but then Gargamel interrupts the party.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Lost City Of Yore: Curiosity brings Nosey Smurf to the lair of the Hag Sisters, who want to find the terrifying Sceptre of Yore... And Gargamel wants to cheat the two witches as he tries to destroy the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Adventures Of Robin Smurf: The Smurfs' theatrical production of 'Robin Smurf' comes to life as the legendary hero is portrayed by a really good actor...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette For A Day: Hefty dresses like Smurfette to lure an enamored gnome, Piltkin, away from the Smurf Village. They burrow underground and meet a female gnome who falls in love with Piltkin who then casts Smurfette aside for his new heartthrob.

programme.title: Queen Smurfette
programme.desc: Smurfette becomes Queen for a day on her birthday. But this gets out of hand when Father Time falls asleep, neglecting to end the days. Tempers begin to flare among the Smurfs, who are tired of servitude. Papa rushes to wake Father Time and brings peace again to Smurfland.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - April Smurf's Day: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. Papa Smurf instructs Feathers to call the birds to attack the fake bush. After it is stripped, the captured Smurfs climb aboard Feathers and fly away.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Waste Not, Smurf Not: Growing, harvesting and preparing food takes up much of the Smurfs' time. Handy invents a machine that farms and processes food. But this wonderful invention has its drawbacks...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Tis The Season To Be Smurfy: This is Wild Smurf's first Christmas, and he's impressed by the decorations in the Village of the Smurfs. But Grandpa and Sassette are going to teach him the real meaning of Christmas when they help an old couple to live the most beautiful Christmas they've ever seen...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Prince And The Hopper: What is that strange talking frog that Morlock the Wizard sends all of Prince Theodore's soldiers to catch? Is it a demon frog, as he says, or something else? Truth will out when Smurfette and the Smurflings meet the frog. They help to change this frog back into Prince Theodore himself, for he's been the victim of a spell cast by Morlock.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - All's Smurfy That Ends Smurfy: Gargamel's theft of the Fairies' gold almost brings a state of war between the Fairies and the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Pet For Baby Smurf: There is a prize for the cutest pet of a Smurf. Baby Smurf brings a cute, lovely, affectionate Glowing Darling, a pet anybody falls in love with… But this pet is a creation of Gargamel, the evil wizard intent on destroying the Smurfs!

programme.title: The Purple Smurfs
programme.desc: The purple fly bites Lazy and an epidemic starts that turns the little villagers into angry, purple Smurfs. Papa Smurf discovers that the pollen from a tuberose flower is an antidote and soon things are smurfy again.

programme.title: The Answer Smurf
programme.desc: Nobody ever listens to Brainy Smurf's advice, and when Papa Smurf is away and Brainy feels he's in charge, he decides he's going to be the one with all the answers. There is a magic formula in Papa Smurf's Book of Spells that ensures everyone in the Village of the Smurfs is going to ask for Brain's opinion. As if matters weren't difficult enough, here's Gargamel...

programme.title: Hefty And The Wheelsmurfer
programme.desc: Hefty Smurf learns what is to be handicapped when he breaks his leg. Handy Smurf creates the wheelsmurfer for him, a contraption that will give Hefty some mobility. But suddenly the evil wizard Gargamel appears on the scene.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Bubble, Bubble, Smurfs In Trouble: Each morning, dew is deposited by water sprites on forest leaves. Wait till you see what happens when Scaredy Smurf gets hold of the dew-making magic wand...

programme.title: He Who Smurfs Last
programme.desc: Jokey's practical jokes go too far when Chlorhydris is the victim of one. She gets her revenge on the Smurfs by creating a spell to steal their sense of humor. Grouchy, who had no sense of humor to begin with, breaks the spell by getting back the humor potion.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Fake Smurf: Hogatha turns herself into a Smurf, plotting revenge on the little people for destroying her magic locket. Papa Smurf outwits her and banishes her from the forest once more.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Jokey's Shadow: Accidents do happen. This time it is Jokey Smurf's mistake that ends up with his shadow coming to independent life! And the shadow loves to play practical jokes on the whole population of the Village of the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Rabbids are making a mess!
programme.desc: After discovering the joys of tennis, the Rabbids move the game onto an airport runway.

programme.title: The Rabbids are panicking!
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, two Rabbids become convinced that their boss has turned into a balloon.

programme.title: The Rabbids are part of the family.
programme.desc: Three particularly stupid rabbids get banned from the rabbid headquaters and wander about the suburbs.

programme.title: The Rabbids are making a mess!
programme.desc: After discovering the joys of tennis, the Rabbids move the game onto an airport runway.

programme.title: Rabbids robbery.
programme.desc: The Rabbids follow a burglary.

programme.title: Rabbid Obsession.
programme.desc: The rabbids have decided to reach the moon... thanks to a big ladder.

programme.title: Welcome to the Rabbids!
programme.desc: A solitary rabbid who has no friend to fly with him to the Moon goes out on a search for one.

programme.title: The Rabbids travel.
